evals.prompt: In src/components/Hero.ts, implement TypeGPU behavior for a product surface and explain the validation gates.
evals.expected_output: Uses typegpu routing, checks installed versions, applies domain-specific WebGPU guidance, runs or recommends the bundled audit CLI where relevant, and reports validation evidence.
assertions: Mentions the relevant installed package/runtime/version checks for WebGPU.
Uses at least one typegpu bundled reference or explains why no extra reference was needed.
Includes reduced-motion/accessibility or explains why the effect is essential and already covered.
Includes cleanup/interruption/runtime validation appropriate to TypeGPU schemas, typed buffers/textures, shader functions, pipelines, WebGPU capability checks, and CPU/GPU resource ownership..
Does not route the task to an unrelated near-miss skill.
